name: cloudcasa-agent
description: Backup, restore, DR, and data migration for NKP and all other Kubernetes clusters
overview:
## Overview

CloudCasa is a Kubernetes backup, recovery, DR, and migration solution for Nutanix Kubernetes Platform and all other
major Kubernetes distributions and managed services.

Built for NKP users seeking a powerful, easy-to-use, and scalable solution, CloudCasa combines Nutanix’s high-performance
infrastructure with intuitive, Kubernetes-native backup, migration, and DR capabilities.
Its enterprise-ready design includes full multi-tenancy and RBAC-driven self-service to support platform teams, business units, and service providers.

## Key Features

o Kubernetes-native backups with file-level and resource-level recovery.

o Manage cross-cluster, cross-tenant, cross-region and cross-cloud backups and recoveries from a single dashboard.

o Seamless application migration between NKP clusters, whether on-prem or in the cloud.

o Hybrid restore options for rapid failover to secondary Nutanix sites or public cloud clusters.

o Back up to Nutanix Objects, S3 and S3-cpmpatible object storage, Azure Blob storage, or NFS/CIFS file storage.

o Support for immutable backups to protect against ransomware and satisfy compliance requirements.

o Multi-tenant support with granular RBAC to safely delegate backup and restore operations.

o Available as SaaS or a self-hosted deployment.

## More Information

**[Sign up](https://cloudcasa.io/) to try CloudCasa for free**

**See the [CloudCasa User Guide]( https://docs.cloudcasa.io/help/)**

**See our [CloudCasa for NKP](https://cloudcasa.io/partners/nutanix-kubernetes-platform-backup-migration-and-dr/) page**
